ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>★★★★★<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, maintains persona consistency with the Gatekeeper's role and concerns about security. It could be more natural in tone to avoid sounding too formal or robotic.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>★★★☆☆<TAB>The response lacks context relevance and does not align with the persona of a strict royal guard who would be suspicious of strangers.
